Author: Solona
Name: Proteus
Description: Headless overlay compositor for Penumbra. Discovers mods with a Proteus/ sidecar, composites their overlay textures in Penumbra priority order, and maintains a single managed mod at priority 999. No authoring UI — all work happens in external tools. Type /proteus to open the status window.
Punchline: Automatic overlay compositor for Penumbra mods
